title: Lead Investment Banker at United India Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at United India Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, United India Insurance in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About United India Insurance:
United India Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
